title: Born in Braunau am Inn
description: Adolf Hitler is born on April 20, 1889, in Braunau am Inn, Austria-Hungary.

title: Father Dies
description: Hitler's father Alois dies in 1903 while the family is living near Linz.

title: Moves to Vienna
description: In 1907 Hitler goes to Vienna hoping to study art.

title: Rejected by Vienna Academy
description: In 1907 Hitler fails the entrance exam for the Academy of Fine Arts Vienna.

title: Mother Dies
description: Hitler's mother Klara dies in December 1907.

title: Moves to Munich
description: In 1913 Hitler leaves Austria and settles in Munich.

title: Joins Bavarian Army
description: At the outbreak of World War I in 1914, Hitler volunteers for the Bavarian Army.

title: Wounded in Gas Attack
description: In October 1918 Hitler is temporarily blinded in a mustard gas attack near Ypres.

title: Joins German Workers' Party
description: In 1919 Hitler joins the German Workers' Party, the small group that becomes the Nazi Party.

title: NSDAP and 25-Point Program
description: In 1920 the party renames itself the NSDAP and announces its 25-point program.

title: Becomes Nazi Party Leader
description: By 1921 Hitler establishes himself as the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party.

title: Beer Hall Putsch Fails
description: In November 1923 Hitler's attempted coup in Munich fails and he is arrested.

title: Imprisoned at Landsberg
description: In 1924 Hitler is convicted of treason and imprisoned at Landsberg.

title: Publishes Mein Kampf
description: The first volume of Mein Kampf is published in 1925 after Hitler's release from prison.

title: Nazi Electoral Breakthrough
description: In the 1930 Reichstag election, the Nazis become a major national political force.

title: Becomes Chancellor
description: Hitler is appointed Chancellor of Germany on January 30, 1933.

title: Enabling Act Passed
description: On March 23, 1933, the Enabling Act becomes the cornerstone of Hitler's dictatorship.

title: Night of the Long Knives
description: In June 1934 Hitler orders a purge of rivals within the Nazi movement and beyond.

title: Becomes Fuhrer
description: After President Hindenburg dies in August 1934, Hitler combines the offices of president and chancellor.

title: Nuremberg Laws
description: On September 15, 1935, the Nazi regime passes the Nuremberg Race Laws.

title: Remilitarizes Rhineland
description: In 1936 Hitler sends German forces into the Rhineland in defiance of the Versailles settlement.

title: Anschluss with Austria
description: In March 1938 Nazi Germany annexes Austria.

title: Kristallnacht
description: On November 9-10, 1938, Nazi leaders coordinate a nationwide anti-Jewish pogrom.

title: Invades Poland
description: Germany invades Poland on September 1, 1939, beginning World War II in Europe.

title: Invades the Soviet Union
description: On June 22, 1941, Hitler launches Operation Barbarossa against the Soviet Union.

title: Survives July 20 Plot
description: On July 20, 1944, Hitler survives a bomb attack by German officers at his headquarters.

title: Dies in Berlin
description: Hitler dies by suicide in Berlin on April 30, 1945, as Nazi Germany collapses.
